title: Call of andventure Mini
description: This version "Call of andventure" for weak pc
body:
# Why should I install this modpack?
- A hundred different structures to explore, a lot of boss fights,  a lot of weapons and armor and a lot of equipment. This modpack features many mechanics that are not found in other modpacks (for example, more complex portal opening or archeology)
- So few mods, and a lot content ! 
# Release trailer!
## <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9WBiV4KefSA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
### 
Not all content from the trailer is in the modpack
- Page "Mowzie`s mobs" on Curseforge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs
